title: onosma gmelinii var. microcarpa
intro: Onosma gmelinii var. microcarpa, also known as a type of Onosma plant, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is used in traditional Chinese medicine, valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. In terms of herbal preparations, Onosma gmelinii var. microcarpa is often used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are used to treat a range of health issues.
